## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Why is this change needed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore/maintenance

## Validation

- [ ] App starts successfully
- [ ] `python -m compileall app` ran successfully
- [ ] Relevant tests were run (if available)

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed existing project style and patterns
- [ ] I did not include secrets or sensitive data
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior/setup changed
- [ ] I kept the change scoped and focused

## Notes for reviewers

- Risks, caveats, or follow-up items:
